policy_description: This step only prepares result review artifacts.
Matched evidence is not a ready candidate in this step.
A human/user decision is required before ready materialization.
Ligand atom names are carried from Step 14T raw struct_conn evidence.
Unmatched inputs remain blocked and are not ready candidates.
Training is not allowed in this step.
Sample and final dataset artifacts are not written.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
Leakage/split gate remains required before training.
The canonical five masks remain unchanged.
The review template cannot be used as training input.
